request.description: Create a new user account and receive an access token and refresh token (set in cookie).
Authenticate with email and password to receive an access token and refresh token (set in cookie).
Clear the refresh token cookie and invalidate the current session.
Use the refresh token stored in the cookie to obtain a new access token.
Update the password for the currently authenticated user.
Change a user's role (e.g., from 'user' to 'admin'). Only administrators can perform this action.
Soft-delete a user account by its ID. Only administrators can perform this action.
Search for users by name or email with pagination support.
Soft-delete multiple user accounts simultaneously. Only administrators can perform this action.
Retrieve high-level system analytics including user counts and task completion rates. Restricted to administrators.
Retrieve a paginated list of active users. Administrators can see all users, while regular users have restricted access.
Create and assign a task directly to a specific user by their ID. Restricted to administrators.
Retrieve tasks from all active users or a specific user. Restricted to administrators.
Search through the current user's tasks by title or description.
Filter the current user's tasks by status or priority.
Retrieve completion statistics for the current user's tasks.
Retrieve full details of a specific task by its ID.
Permanently remove a task from the system.
Update the status or priority of multiple tasks in a single request. Restricted to administrators.
Create a new task for the currently authenticated user.
Retrieve a paginated list of tasks owned by the currently authenticated user.
Modify an existing task's title, description, status, or priority.
